entries.answer:
The library is open:

**Regular Hours:**
• Monday-Friday: 8:00 AM - 10:00 PM
• Saturday-Sunday: 10:00 AM - 8:00 PM

**Extended Hours (During Exams):**
• Monday-Sunday: 7:00 AM - 12:00 AM

**Holiday Schedule:**
The library is closed on official holidays.

questions: How many books can I borrow?
entries.answer:
**Borrowing Limits:**

**For Students:**
• Maximum books: 5
• Loan period: 14 days
• Renewals allowed: 1 time (if no holds)

**For Staff:**
• Maximum books: 10
• Loan period: 30 days
• Renewals allowed: 2 times

**Overdue Items:**
• Fine: ₦50 per day per book
• Maximum fine: ₦1000 per book
• Borrowing privileges suspended until fines paid

questions: What services does the library offer?
Can I print in the library?
entries.answer:
**Library Services:**

1. **Borrowing Services** - Books, journals, media
2. **Research Assistance** - Librarian consultations
3. **Printing & Copying** - B&W (₦10/page), Color (₦50/page)
4. **WiFi Access** - 'Library-WiFi' network
5. **Study Spaces** - Quiet zones, group study rooms
6. **Computer Lab** - 50+ computers with internet
7. **Database Access** - 50+ academic databases
8. **Interlibrary Loan** - Request materials from other libraries
9. **Reference Desk** - Research and citation help
10. **Workshops** - Regular training sessions

questions: How do I find a book?
entries.answer:
**Finding Books in the Library:**

1. **Search Online Catalog:**
   • Visit library website
   • Use search box
   • Filter by author, title, subject

2. **Understand Call Numbers:**
   • Books organized by Library of Congress system
   • Example: QA76.73.P98 (Computer Science section)

3. **Locate in Library:**
   • Ground Floor: Reference, New Arrivals
   • 1st Floor: Social Sciences, Humanities
   • 2nd Floor: Sciences, Engineering
   • 3rd Floor: Quiet Study, Special Collections

4. **Get Help:**
   • Ask at circulation desk
   • Use library floor maps
   • Request librarian assistance

**Digital Resources Available:**

**Databases (On-campus):**
• JSTOR - Arts & Sciences
• IEEE Xplore - Engineering
• ScienceDirect - Science
• SpringerLink - Multidisciplinary
• PubMed - Medicine
• ACM Digital Library - Computing
• ProQuest - Dissertations & Theses

**E-Book Collections:**
• EBSCO eBooks
• Springer eBooks
• O'Reilly Learning

**Remote Access:**
Use your library credentials to access all digital resources from anywhere.

**Research Guides:**
Subject-specific guides available on library website.

**Library Facilities:**

**Ground Floor:**
• Circulation Desk
• Reference Collection
• New Arrivals
• Group Study Rooms (Bookable)
• Computer Lab (50+ PCs)
• Printing/Copying Station

**First Floor:**
• Social Sciences Collection
• Humanities Collection
• Quiet Study Area
• Current Periodicals

**Second Floor:**
• Sciences Collection
• Engineering Collection
• Quiet Study Carrels
• Thesis Collection

**Third Floor:**
• Special Collections
• Archives
• Silent Study Zone
• Faculty Research Area

**Other Facilities:**
• WiFi throughout building
• Drinking water stations
• Restrooms on each floor
• Elevator access
• Wheelchair accessible

**Library Membership:**

**Primary Users (Automatic Membership):**
• All registered students
• All staff members
• Use your ID as library card

**Secondary Users (With Conditions):**
• Alumni: Free access with alumni card
• Visiting scholars: Letter from department required
• Consortium members: Reciprocal agreement

**Guest Users:**
• Limited access to physical collection
• No borrowing privileges
• Internet access: ₦500/day

**All users must:**
• Register at circulation desk
• Follow library rules and regulations
• Respect quiet study areas

**Getting Research Help:**

1. **Research Consultations:**
   • Book appointment with subject librarian
   • 30-60 minute sessions
   • Help with search strategies, databases, citations

2. **Research Guides:**
   • Subject-specific guides on library website
   • Database recommendations
   • Citation style guides

3. **Workshops:**
   • Database training sessions
   • Citation management (Zotero/Mendeley)
   • Research skills development

4. **Online Help:**
   • Live chat with librarian
   • Email research questions
   • Video tutorials on website

5. **Citation Help:**
   • Style guides at reference desk
   • Online citation generators
   • Individual consultation available

**Library Rules & Conduct:**

**General Conduct:**
• Respect quiet study areas
• Keep conversations at low volume
• Use cell phones in designated areas only
• No disruptive behavior

**Food & Drink:**
• Covered drinks allowed
• Snacks allowed in cafeteria only
• No hot meals in study areas
• Clean up after yourself

**Resource Use:**
• Handle library materials carefully
• Return books on time
• Report damaged items
• No marking in books

**Computer Use:**
• Academic purposes priority
• No inappropriate websites
• Save files to personal devices
• Log out when finished

**Violations may result in:**
• Warning
• Temporary suspension
• Loss of privileges
• Disciplinary action

**Contact the Library:**

**Main Library:**
📍 Address: University Library
           Campus Main Building
📞 Phone: +234 (0)123 456 7890
📧 Email: library@university.edu
🌐 Website: library.university.edu

**Department Contacts:**
• Circulation Desk: Ext. 1001
• Reference Desk: Ext. 1002
• Technical Services: Ext. 1003
• Digital Resources: Ext. 1004
• Interlibrary Loan: Ext. 1005

**Social Media:**
• Twitter: @UniversityLibrary
• Facebook: University Library
• Instagram: @universitylibrary

**Office Hours:**
Monday-Friday: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM
